testimonials.title: WHAT GUESTS SAY
testimonials.subtitle: Verified reviews from guests who booked our luxury yacht rental in Dubai.

review1.name: Daniel H.
review1.text: The booking process was seamless, but the experience aboard the Majesty 101 was beyond words. The crew handled every detail with absolute discretion and professionalism.

review2.name: Sophia L.
review2.text: Exceeded every expectation. From the bespoke catering to the route tailored exactly to our preferences. A true masterclass in luxury hospitality.

review3.name: James T.
review3.text: We booked for a corporate sunset cruise. The yacht was immaculate, the service was invisible yet anticipatory. Highly recommended for exclusive events.

hero.title:

WITH ONBOARD DJ

minutes.desc: Of pure energy and live mixes.

points: Deep House, Lounge, and Chill mix blends.

step1.title: CHOOSE YACHT AND DATE
step1.desc: Send preferred yacht size and duration. We confirm instantly.

step2.title: SELECT YOUR DJ PACK
step2.desc: Choose between Sunset Lounge, Party Mode, or VIP Event and tell us your musical preferences.

step3.title: ROUTE AND EXTRAS
step3.desc: We select the best route (Marina, Palm, Atlantis) and add catering or decoration if you wish.

step4.title: BOARD AND CELEBRATE
step4.desc: Arrive at the marina, come aboard, and enjoy a private party with premier service.

review1.text: The deep house set during sunset was incredible. The sound quality onboard exceeded our expectations.
review1.name: James T.

review2.text: We celebrated my birthday with the Party Mode and the DJ kept the dance floor full all night. A 5-star experience!
review2.name: Sarah M.

review3.text: Unbelievable energy. The DJ really knew how to read the crowd. Best boat party in Dubai.
review3.name: Alex K.

review4.text: Professional setup and great selection of music. Highly recommend for any corporate event.
review4.name: Robert B.

hero.title:
WATER SPORTS
EXPERIENCE
hero.subtitle: Add adrenaline to your day at sea with our premium selection of water sports: Jet Ski, Seabob, Wakeboarding, and more. We handle all logistics and safety so you just enjoy the speed.

jetski.title: JET SKI
jetski.subtitle: The most popular
jetski.desc: High-speed fun with the best views of the Dubai skyline. Perfect for groups taking turns during the charter.

seabob.title: SEABOB
seabob.subtitle: Luxury & Fluidity
seabob.desc: Premium underwater gliding experience. Easy to use, ideal for cinematic underwater videos.

wakeboarding.title: WAKEBOARDING
wakeboarding.subtitle: Pure adrenaline
wakeboarding.desc: For thrill-seekers and sports lovers. Includes professional gear and guide.

banana.title: BANANA RIDE
banana.subtitle: Group fun
banana.desc: Guaranteed laughs activity. Ideal for families and groups of friends wanting to enjoy together.

donut.title: DONUT RIDE
donut.subtitle: Fast and fun
donut.desc: High-energy ride with spins and jumps over the waves. Quick setup and instant fun.

paddle.title: PADDLE BOARD
paddle.subtitle: Relaxation
paddle.desc: Quiet activity to explore scenic routes. Perfect for sunrise or sunset.

safety.title: SAFETY & BRIEFING
safety.desc: We provide all essential safety gear and quick instructions before starting.

timing.title: PERFECT TIMING
timing.desc: We recommend the best time during your charter based on the route and sea conditions.

content.title: CONTENT MOMENTS
content.desc: Strategic points near iconic monuments for amazing action photos and videos.

items.q: Can I add sports to any yacht?
items.a: Yes, we confirm compatibility based on the yacht size and chosen route to ensure maximum safety and fun.
Absolutely. We give a quick guide, complete safety gear, and escort if necessary.
Usually when the sea is calmest, preferably in the mornings or before sunset.
Yes, many clients mix Jet Ski with SeaBob to create a personalized water park in the sea.

review1.text: Adding the Jet Ski to the charter was the best decision. We all took turns and the photos jumping over the waves in front of Atlantis turned out amazing.
review1.name: David L.

review2.text: The team explained everything about the SeaBob very quickly. It feels like flying underwater. Totally premium and very safe.
review2.name: Sophie M.

review3.text: The flyboarding was intense! The instructors were patient and I was flying in minutes.
review3.name: Mark R.

review4.text: Perfect organization. The jet skis were in top condition and the route was scenic.
review4.name: Julia S.

hero.subtitle: DUBAI MARINA, UAE
hero.title: LUXURY YACHT RENTAL
hero.description: Redefining Dubai's skyline. Immerse yourself in a bespoke luxury yacht charter experience. Where state-of-the-art marine engineering meets world-class service. Unparalleled extravagance awaits across Dubai Marina.
hero.scroll_banner: THE GOLD STANDARD OF THE MARINA

footer.description: The pinnacle of luxury yachting in Dubai. A fleet that doesn't just sail the seas, but commands them with unparalleled grace and technical superiority.

intro.title:
THE SUPREME STANDARD IN
PRIVATE NAVIGATION
intro.subtitle: Transforming the Dubai skyline into your personal stage.
intro.p1: High Seas YACHT™ redefines the concept of luxury charter in Dubai Marina and Dubai Harbour. Our fleet is designed for those who accept no compromises, offering the perfect balance between premier naval engineering and unprecedented hospitality. From high-profile celebrations and corporate events to intimate sunset cruises, every nautical mile is covered with absolute precision.
intro.p2: Whether seeking the serenity of a private offshore sanctuary or a sophisticated platform for social events, our collection of vessels ensures comfort, discretion, and an onboard experience that exceeds any expectation in the waters of the Emirates.
intro.why_choose: Why choose the High Seas YACHT experience?

hero.title:
FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS
hero.description: Clear answers for yacht bookings, departures from Dubai Marina and Dubai Harbour, VIP fleet, routes, and onboard services.

steps.title:
SIMPLE STEPS TO BOOK YOUR
PREMIER YACHT

q1.q: What is included in the High Seas Yacht rental price?
q1.a: Includes: yacht, captain, crew, standard fuel, soft drinks, ice, and towels.

q2.a: Via WhatsApp with date, pax, and duration.

q3.q: Where do the yachts depart from in Dubai?

q4.q: How far in advance should I book?
q4.a: We recommend 48h, but we accommodate last-minute requests subject to availability.

q5.q: How do I confirm my booking?
q5.a: By paying the deposit and confirming via WhatsApp.

q6.q: Can you send the exact map location after booking?
q6.a: Yes, a direct Google Maps link to the boarding pier is sent.

q1.q: What should we bring for the yacht trip?
q1.a: Comfortable clothing, sunscreen, and original ID documents.

q2.q: Are outside food and drinks allowed?
q2.a: Yes, you can bring what you wish or request our premium catering.

q3.q: Do you offer BBQ and catering services?
q3.a: Yes, we have BBQ and luxury catering menus upon advance request.

q4.q: Are there shaded areas on the yachts?
q4.a: All our yachts feature spacious shaded areas and air-conditioned lounges.

q5.q: Can we stop at a restaurant or near a monument?
q5.a: Yes, we can anchor in front of the Burj Al Arab, Atlantis, or Ain Dubai for photos and swimming.

q6.a: Only on selected vessels and under specific conditions.

q7.q: Can we smoke on the yacht?
q7.a: Only in the open areas of the exterior deck.

q8.a: Yes, according to UAE maritime regulations.

q1.q: Do you have yachts for 10, 20, or 30 guests?
q1.a: We have a versatile fleet ranging from sports yachts to high-capacity mega-yachts.

q2.q: Do you organize marriage proposals or birthdays?
q2.a: We are experts in personalized decorations and romantic setups.

q3.q: Is a DJ available for yacht parties?
q3.a: Yes, we can include a professional DJ and high-fidelity sound systems.

q4.q: Do you offer Jet Skis and water sports?
q4.a: Yes, we can coordinate Jet Skis and Flyboards to be delivered to your yacht.

q5.a: Yes, we offer photography and drone video services.

q6.q: Do you do branding or banners for corporate events?
q6.a: Yes, we customize the yacht for brand launches and corporate events.

q1.q: What happens if the weather is bad on the booking day?
q1.a: If the Coast Guard restricts departure, we reschedule or refund your deposit.

q2.a: We evaluate refund conditions based on advance notice timeframe and internal rules.

q3.q: What time should we arrive before departure?
q3.a: We recommend arriving 15-20 minutes early for a relaxed boarding process.

q4.q: Is there parking near the pickup point?
q4.a: Yes, there are parking options in Dubai Marina Mall and surrounding areas.

cta.whatsapp_message: Hello, I am interested in chartering the {{yacht}}.

experience.title: The Experience
experience.stats: {{yacht}}. Price per hour {{price}} AED. Capacity {{capacity}} pax. Cabins {{cabins}}.
experience.p1: Whether you are planning an intimate sunset cruise, a lively celebration, or a high-end corporate event, every inch of this yacht is tailored to perfection. Featuring premium lounge areas, state-of-the-art entertainment systems, and luxurious accommodations.
experience.p2: Our highly trained premier crew is dedicated to anticipating your every need—from expertly crafted catering menus to navigating the spectacular coastlines of the UAE. Your journey is limited only by your imagination.

items.q: What is included in the charter price?
items.a: The standard rental price includes the exclusive use of the yacht, a licensed captain and professional crew, fuel for cruising around Dubai Marina and JBR, safety equipment, drinking water, and ice. Soft drinks and snacks are also complimentary.

items.q: How many guests are permitted onboard?
items.a: Safety is our top priority. The {{yacht}} holds a strict maritime passenger limit of {{capacity}} guests. This limit includes adults, children, and infants.

items.q: Can we bring our own food and alcohol?
items.a: Absolutely! You are welcome to bring your own food and alcoholic beverages. We provide glasses, ice, and basic serving equipment. Alternatively, we can arrange premium catering and professional mixologists for you.

items.q: What is the minimum rental duration?
items.a: The minimum booking duration is 2 hours. However, we highly advise booking at least 3-4 hours if you wish to comfortably cruise past the Palm Jumeirah, Burj Al Arab, and anchor for swimming.
